inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakan mehsoos kar rahi hoon

inputs.text: Mujhe sukha khaansi ho rahi hai, kabhi-kabhi saans lene meh dikkat hoti hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

hypotheses.rationale: Still a possibility, but less likely

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Main raat ko bahut pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, aur khaansi ab tak 2 hafte se zyada huyi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Cardinal signs of night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough are indicative of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as symptoms have progressed beyond typical bronchitis presentation

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but less likely than tuberculosis at this stage

inputs.text: Main ab bahut kamzor mehsoos kar rahi hoon, aur mujhe khaansi mein khoon aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Presence of blood in sputum and severe weakness confirms tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
